prompt: Create a new Atlas Stream Processing workspace called 'dev-streams' in AWS us-east-1 with an SP10 tier

resource_naming_strategy.note: Appends Unix timestamp to avoid conflicts with existing workspaces

pre_test_setup.action: Call atlas-streams-discover action='list-workspaces' to verify test workspace doesn't exist

post_test_validation.action: Call atlas-streams-discover action='inspect-workspace' to confirm workspace exists with correct config

post_test_cleanup.action: Call atlas-streams-teardown resource='workspace' to remove test workspace
post_test_cleanup.note: Only delete if cleanup_enabled=true in test config

success_criteria.workspace_state: Workspace is created and accessible via inspect-workspace
